leadText: Room Service (Japanese: ルームサービス Room Service) is a type of consumable held item introduced in Generation VIII. It lowers the holder's Speed in Trick Room.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the move Trick Room is used while a Pokémon is holding Room Service, the Room Service is consumed, causing the holder's Speed to drop by one stage. Additionally, Room Service will also be consumed if a Pokémon holding it switches in while Trick Room is already in effect, similar to Electric Seed and the other terrain seeds.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Battle Tower (15 BP ) Sw Sh IA Cram-o-matic ( Fairy : 62-70 points) Sw Sh CT Giant's Bed S V Delibird Presents ( Levincia Branch, after completing the main storyline)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. Lowers Speed when Trick Room takes effect. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. If Trick Room takes effect, this item will lower the holder's Speed stat.
